{{CargoOrgan
|name=Rakshasa Demon Eye
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10716
|idx=74
|description="We ran through the endless mist, but could never escape the massive eye watching us... like a nightmare from which we can never wake."
— Demon King's Revelation
|skill=Shoot a spiritual ray, dealing DMG equal to 220% of ATK!
|hp=2280
|def=225
|atk=340
|rush=277
|gene1=Per Xenoking Organ implanted, {race} ATK +42
Xenoking Organs implanted: 7/7
|gene2=Snail Arena, Ignore Enemy DMG REDUC +8%
|gene3=Per 30 Star Coins redeemed, {race} ATK +70
Star Coin Redeems: 90/90
|gene4=In Snail Arena, {race} ATK +140
|gene5=Fire RES +120
|gene6=Snail Arena, enemy Lifesteal Rate -40%
|gene7=Snail Arena, Ignore Enemy DMG REDUC +8% (Awakened)
|}}
